title: lib-create creates verilog DPI wrapper with non-matching ports (ignores LSB index)

features.name: module port with non-zero LSB index in DPI wrapper context
features.description: Code should include a module port declared with a non-zero LSB index such as input logic [7:4], which when processed by DPI lib-create will cause the wrapper to incorrectly expand the port width to start from index 0
